sections.paragraph:
Original: ירד

Transliteration: yârad

Phonetic: yaw-rad'

BDB Definition:

  1. to go down, descend, decline, march down, sink down
    1. (Qal)
      1. to go or come down
      2. to sink
      3. to be prostrated
      4. to come down (of revelation)
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to bring down
      2. to send down
      3. to take down
      4. to lay prostrate
      5. to let down
    3. (Hophal)
      1. to be brought down
      2. to be taken down

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 909

Part(s) of speech: Verb
